subcodes.first_line: The Book proclaimeth the Truth, yet the people hear it not. By God! The Cock of the Throne hath crowed, and Its Dove hath warbled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینطق بالحق ولکن الناس هم لایسمعون تالله قد دلع دیک العرش و هدرت حمامه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
